Hi Maisa. Can we schedule a meeting this week?
Sure! Are you free on Monday?
Monday is difficult. I am not available in the morning.
No problem. Can we meet on Tuesday?
Tuesday is good. What time?
Can we meet at three PM, in the afternoon?
Three PM is perfect. Let us confirm Tuesday at three.
Great. I will book the meeting room and send you an invite.
Thank you. Please confirm by email.
Of course. See you on Tuesday!
Can we schedule a meeting this week?
I am not available. Can we reschedule?
Let us confirm the meeting by email.

Hi Maisa, this is David. I have a small problem with our meeting. I am not available on Monday morning. I have an appointment at nine. Can we reschedule? I am free on Tuesday afternoon, at three PM. Please confirm the new time by email. Also, I want to book the big meeting room for our call. Thank you. See you on Tuesday!

Hello, this is Sarah from the finance team. I would like to invite you to a call next week. Are you free on Wednesday? We usually start at ten in the morning. The call is about the new client. It is not long, only thirty minutes. Please confirm your schedule with me. I am available every day this week, except Friday. I look forward to our call!
Hello David. Are you free on Monday? Can we meet at three in the afternoon? Let us confirm the meeting by email.
